description: Create a radiant floor heating layout in LibreCAD. Draw a 3000mm x 2500mm room boundary starting at (0,0) on layer 'WALLS' (White). On layer 'HEATING' (Red), draw a continuous serpentine PEX tubing loop starting at (150, 150) and ending at (150, 2350). The loop must maintain a 150mm offset from all walls with 200mm spacing between horizontal runs. Save the drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/radiant_heating_layout.dxf.
